MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff William Wongis present.
Attorney David Foran appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Diane Maher and Rafael Maher is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Zadik Shapiro , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of APR-02-2012 is vacated.(501)
